Frequently Asked Questions
How do I add money to my account?
Go to Transfer → Deposit Funds or click the Add Money button on your dashboard. You can link an external bank account using your routing and account number. Deposits take 1–2 business days.
How do I freeze my card?
Go to Cards, find the card you want to freeze, and click the Freeze button. The card will be instantly suspended. You can unfreeze it at any time by clicking the same button.
What are the wire transfer fees?
Premium members enjoy waived wire transfer fees. Standard accounts are charged  per outgoing domestic wire. International wires are ␀. Wire transfers are processed same business day if submitted before 5 PM EST.
How do I change my account name?
Click directly on your name in the dashboard greeting — it is highlighted in gold. A prompt will appear where you can type your preferred name. The name updates immediately across the site.
Is my money FDIC insured?
Yes. All deposits at Just Unique Stories Bank are insured by the FDIC up to (,000 per depositor, per account category.

Why Link Accounts?
Instant Transfers
Move money between your Just Unique Stories account and any linked bank in seconds.
Pay with Any Card
Use linked debit or credit cards to fund your account or make external payments.
Bank-Level Security
All linked accounts use 256-bit encryption and are verified via micro-deposits.

How to receive an ACH transfer:
Share the routing and account numbers above with whoever is sending you money. Standard ACH typically takes 1–3 business days. Same-day ACH is available if the sender's bank supports it.
